race.comment: DUNWITHYA (2) improving Dundeel gelding who resumed with an eye-catching fourth over 1500m at Kembla Grange on a heavy (8) surface. Proven second-up performer who will be savaging the line in a weaker race. GRAYNITA (11) strengthened over the break and can keep raising the bar as she stretches out to the 1600m. Went back from the draw and circled the field with a solid third over 1400m at Corowa. Can race closer from the better gate and shapes as a top-three player. SACRED INGOT (13) just under a month between runs when he knocked up in the straight to run eighth over 1605m at the Sapphire Coast. Has further upside with winning jockey going back on. EXCEED SUCCESS (4) goes well at this course and distance and was a month between runs at latest with a tiring seventh over 1605m at the Sapphire Coast. Likely to go back and be ridden for luck. Place best.
